    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    C

    city - Variable in class model.Address
     
    cityField - Variable in class presentation.ClientFormDialog
     
    clearForm() - Method in class presentation.OrderView
    Clears the form fields (client, product, quantity) after an order is successfully placed.
    Client - Class in model
    Represents a client with its associated details such as client ID, name, email, address ID, telephone number, and an address object.
    Client() - Constructor for class model.Client
    Default constructor.
    Client(int, String, String, int, String) - Constructor for class model.Client
     
    Client(int, String, String, Address, String) - Constructor for class model.Client
    Constructs a client with a full Address object.
    Client(String, String, int, String) - Constructor for class model.Client
    Constructs a client without a client ID (e.g. before inserting into DB).
    ClientBLL - Class in businessLayer
    Business Logic Layer for handling client-related operations.
    ClientBLL() - Constructor for class businessLayer.ClientBLL
     
    clientComboBox - Variable in class presentation.OrderView
     
    ClientController - Class in presentation
    The ClientController class handles the logic for responding to user interactions in the ClientView UI.
    ClientController(ClientView) - Constructor for class presentation.ClientController
     
    clientDAO - Variable in class businessLayer.ClientBLL
     
    clientDAO - Variable in class presentation.ClientController
     
    ClientDAO - Class in dataAccess
    DAO class for managing Client records and their associated Address records.
    ClientDAO() - Constructor for class dataAccess.ClientDAO
     
    ClientFormDialog - Class in presentation
    ClientFormDialog is a specialized JDialog used to handle the creation or editing of client forms.
    ClientFormDialog(JFrame) - Constructor for class presentation.ClientFormDialog
     
    ClientFormDialog(JFrame, Client) - Constructor for class presentation.ClientFormDialog
     
    clientId - Variable in class model.Client
     
    clientId - Variable in class model.Order
     
    clientTable - Variable in class presentation.ClientView
     
    ClientView - Class in presentation
    The ClientView class represents the user interface for managing clients.
    ClientView() - Constructor for class presentation.ClientView
     
    close(Connection) - Static method in class Connection.ConnectionFactory
    Safely closes a database connection.
    close(ResultSet) - Static method in class Connection.ConnectionFactory
    Safely closes a ResultSet.
    close(Statement) - Static method in class Connection.ConnectionFactory
    Safely closes a SQL statement.
    Connection - package Connection
     
    ConnectionFactory - Class in Connection
    Singleton class responsible for managing database connections.
    ConnectionFactory() - Constructor for class Connection.ConnectionFactory
     
    createConnection() - Method in class Connection.ConnectionFactory
    Creates a new database connection.
    createObjects(ResultSet) - Method in class dataAccess.AbstractDAO
     
    createOrder() - Method in class presentation.OrderView
    Creates an order using the selected client, product, and quantity, then places the order.
    createSelectQuery(String) - Method in class dataAccess.AbstractDAO
    Creates a SELECT SQL query string to find entries by a given field.
